description: Tech news aggregation and curation. No official API exists. This spec describes the RSS, OPML, search, and HTML surfaces available for programmatic access. No authentication required.

tools.name: feed-xml_get-main-feed
tools.description: Top 15 headlines currently on Techmeme. RSS 2.0 format. Each item has title, link (to Techmeme permalink), description (HTML with source attribution, image, and excerpt), pubDate, guid.

tools.name: lb-opml_get-leaderboard-opml
tools.description: OPML file listing Techmeme's top 51 sources with source name, website URL, and RSS feed URL. Updated regularly based on headline prominence over the past 180 days.

tools.name: river_get
tools.description: 5-day rolling archive of all Techmeme headlines in reverse chronological order. 150+ headlines with timestamp, author, source publication, headline text, and article link. HTML page.

tools.name: techmeme-search_headlines
tools.description: Search Techmeme headlines. Supports quoted phrases, wildcards, +/-, AND/OR/NOT, parentheses. Can filter by url, author, date, sourcename. Default searches title+summary; can extend to full text. Results available as HTML or RSS. Required: q. Optional: wm (default: false), start (default: 0).

params.name: q
params.description: Search query (supports operators like AND, OR, NOT, sourcename:X)

tools.name: techmeme-search_rss
tools.description: RSS feed of search results. Same query syntax as /search/query. Subscribe in any RSS reader for alerts on specific topics. Required: q. Optional: wm (default: false).
